name: PRO DEX INC
business: Pro-Dex, Inc. specializes in the design, development, and manufacture of autoclavable, battery-powered and electric, multi-function surgical drivers and shavers used primarily in the orthopedic, thoracic, and craniomaxillofacial (CMF) markets. The company also manufactures and sells rotary air motors to a wide range of industries, but these comprise a de minimis portion of its business. Its medical device products are sold primarily to original equipment manufacturers, and its air motors are sold to a wide range of distributors and end users.
sellsTo: distributors and end users (for air motors)

exposures.sentence: Pro-Dex, Inc. specializes in the design, development, and manufacture of autoclavable, battery-powered and electric, multi-function surgical drivers and shavers used primarily in the orthopedic, thoracic, and craniomaxillofacial (CMF) markets.
